candidates.why: Best total top-line revenue row; preferred over component rows like Net Sales and Other Revenue since REVT should be a single reported revenue line.
Core sales line and useful fallback across years if total revenue label changes.
Same concept with different capitalization, appears in some years and can serve as lower-priority fallback.
Revenue-related but only a component, not appropriate as primary REVT unless no total/sales line existed.
Explicit balancing row, should not be used for REVT.
Balancing row, should not be used for REVT.
Expense row, not revenue.
Non-operating gain/loss, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Result from sales of shares in subsidiaries
candidates.why: Disposal gain/loss, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Other Deferred Expenses and Prepaid Revenue
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability/deferral item, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Using priority list for changing revenue labels across years. Prefer Total Revenue first, then Net Sales / Net sales as fallbacks. Excluded Other Revenue because it is a component, not the full top line.

candidates.why: Direct cost line and most standard COGS label.
Duplicate/alternate wording of the same concept with identical values; lower-priority fallback.

variables.notes: Selected the standard COGS label and avoided duplicating the alternate label with identical values.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Clear SG&A overhead component.
Can be SG&A-related overhead, but preview is empty and more direct SG&A components already exist.
Balance sheet asset/intangible-related row, not period SG&A expense.
Operating metric, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row exists in the preview, so selected the best overhead components. Excluded Development expenses as XRD, and excluded depreciation/amortization and other non-overhead items.

candidates.why: Best match for current-period R&D expense.
Amortization of capitalized development costs, not current R&D expense; should be excluded from XRD.
Balance sheet asset balance, not expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the income statement expense line for R&D. Excluded amortization and balance sheet development asset rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Most direct and specific interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component related to leases; useful fallback if reported separately.
Minor interest-related component; acceptable lower-priority fallback.
Broader finance cost line including non-interest items; use only if no direct interest line is available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate/alternate presentation of lease interest; lower-priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list for changing interest labels across years. Prefer the most specific direct interest expense line first; broader Financial Expenses is included only as a later fallback.

candidates.why: Best available equity line and preferable to Total equity when no separate non-controlling interest line is present.
Valid equity total, but appears duplicate to Shareholders equity; lower-priority fallback.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-vs-NCI split is shown. Prefer Shareholders equity first; Total equity included as fallback if label changes. Because no non-controlling interest line is present, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
